# Relic of Nargothrond

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

*Item. Armor.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** or **_Dwarf_** character. Restricted. Limit 1 per character. Relic of Nargothrond can be played from your discard pile once per round.
Attached character gets +1 DEF.
**Action**: Discard Relic of Nargothrond to give attached character +2 DEF until the end of the phase.
